ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IN LIMINE TO PRECLUDE DEFENDANT FROM CALLING WITNESSES AND INTRODUCING EVUDENCE. BECAUSE DEFENDANT CANNOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AND DISMISSAL OF CITATION NO. 22-2162-0005638 AND DISMISSAL OF THE CORRESPONDING $20,000. FINE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINDRED NURSING CENTERS WEST LLC DBA THE TUNNELL CENTER FOR REHABILITATION AND HEALTHCARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC HEALTH 1. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. 2.CITATION NUMBER 22-2162-0005638-S (THE "CITATION) ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SHALL BE DISMISSED. 3. THE $20,000.00 PENALTY ASSESSED TO PLAINTIFF IN CONNECTION WITH THE CITATION SHALL BE DISMISSED. 4. PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER ITS COSTS, THE AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED PURSUANT TO MEMORANDUM OF COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
